1: While the wicked is before me.
3: Then Then spake I with my tongue.
4: That That I may know how frail I am am .
5: And mine age is is as nothing before thee: Verily every man at his best state is is altogether vanity. Selah. Selah.
6: He heapeth up riches riches , and knoweth not who shall gather them.
7: My hope is is in thee.
8: Make me not the reproach of the foolish.
10: I am consumed by the blow of thine hand.
11: Surely every man is is vanity. Selah. Selah.
12: And And a sojourner, as all my fathers were were .
13: Before I go hence, and be no more.
